indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for prolonged computer use.

indicators.name: no dedicated lighting for screen work
indicators.rationale: The ambient lighting is not suitable for screen work, as it does not provide sufficient task illumination.

indicators.name: no dedicated layout for work
indicators.rationale: The layout is not designed for focused solo work, as it lacks a dedicated workspace.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is largely unsuitable for computer work (solo). The lack of a flat work surface, ergonomic seating, dedicated lighting, and a dedicated layout make it difficult to set up a productive workstation. The presence of a bathtub and candles suggests a relaxation or leisure context rather than a work-focused environment.
